description: A physical security upgrade is underway at a regional warehouse. Provision six 'Meraki MV22' security cameras (CAM-0101 through CAM-0106) in Snipe-IT using the deployment manifest located at `~/Desktop/camera_network_config.txt`. For the functional cameras (CAM-0101 through CAM-0105), update their MAC addresses, IP addresses, and deployment notes from the manifest, and check them out to the 'Chicago Facility' location. For the defective camera (CAM-0106), update its status to 'Defective' and include the DOA note from the manifest in the notes field.
